title: Quorum Queues, Raft Replication, Availability, and Data Safety · Type-System Trace: Quorum Use Case Fit
summary: A team declares quorum queues for ephemeral sessions, assumes any replica count survives any failure, omits confirms and manual acknowledgements, and ignores leader locality, majority loss, backlog, and upgrade behavior. Planned artifact: Add and verify the quorum use case fit increment in quorum queue safety and availability decision record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose quorum queues for durable replicated data safety and reject them for high-churn temporary queues, lowest latency, or extreme backlogs better served by streams.
Give parked messages bounded retention, searchable redacted evidence, owner, repair, replay authorization, duplicate safety, and closure criteria.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Predict Quorum Use Case Fit · Theory Quorum Use Case Fit
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory messaging team handles case 8187 in a multi-tenant case event backbone with three subscriber responsibilities. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to derive majority availability and combine it with publisher and consumer data-safety evidence; prove topology rollback before deleting the old binding; then make the broker confirmation disappear after the message may have committed. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Choose quorum queues for durable replicated data safety and reject them for high-churn temporary queues, lowest latency, or extreme backlogs better served by streams.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Quorum Use Case Fit contract for the supplied data.
